facebook.caption:
5,831 reviews. 4.8 stars. At an Italian restaurant in Phu Quoc.

Ricordo Restaurant inside Mojo Boutique Hotel is doing numbers that most places in Europe can't touch. Fresh pasta, proper wood-fired flavor, cold wine, and zero tourist-trap energy.

If you're staying near Sonasea or just passing through Đường Bào, this one is worth a detour.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the plates land at Ricordo. 4.8 stars across 5,831 reviews. Italian food in Phu Quoc that actually delivers. Inside Mojo Boutique Hotel, Sonasea area.
